document.title: Required Extensions — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2
document.description: Complete structured catalog of all Heritage Gold concepts requiring new implementation in LAWIM_V2

trust_levels.business_reason: Base trust level for all new users; gates access to basic platform features
trust_levels.insufficient_current_model: No trust or verification level exists in V2 User model
trust_levels.proposed_target: Add trust_level INT (1-6) field to User model
trust_levels.impact: Security gates for sensitive operations; trust-based matching weight
trust_levels.decision_question: Default trust level assignment policy for new users

trust_levels.business_reason: OTP phone verification as first identity check; unlocks enhanced platform access
trust_levels.insufficient_current_model: V2 has phoneE164 field but no verification flag or OTP flow
trust_levels.proposed_target: Add phone_verified Boolean to User; implement OTP verification flow
trust_levels.impact: Trust score affects match confidence; phone verification unlocks features

trust_levels.business_reason: Document-based identity verification (CNI/passport); reduces fraud risk
trust_levels.insufficient_current_model: No identity verification concept exists in V2
trust_levels.proposed_target: Add identity_verified Boolean; implement document upload + admin validation workflow
trust_levels.impact: Higher match confidence; trust badge; fraud risk reduction
trust_levels.decision_question: Admin validation threshold for identity documents

trust_levels.concept: Niveau 4 — Documents pro validés (Professional Docs Validated)
trust_levels.business_reason: Professional credential validation for agents/partners; unlocks professional features
trust_levels.insufficient_current_model: No professional document verification workflow in V2
trust_levels.proposed_target: Add professional_docs_verified Boolean; implement pro document workflow
trust_levels.impact: Professional qualification unlocked; trust badge on listings

trust_levels.business_reason: Full professional verification; gates access to pro-tier platform features
trust_levels.insufficient_current_model: No professional verification concept in V2
trust_levels.proposed_target: Add professional_verified Boolean; complete verification workflow
trust_levels.impact: Verified pro badge; prioritized in matches; pro CRM segment

trust_levels.business_reason: Highest trust level; manually granted by admin for reference/power users
trust_levels.insufficient_current_model: No reference account concept in V2
trust_levels.proposed_target: Add reference_account Boolean; admin-only grant mechanism
trust_levels.impact: Maximum system trust; reference badge; premium qualification access
trust_levels.decision_question: Admin-only grant policy for reference account status

badges.business_reason: Visual indicator of phone verification on user profiles
badges.insufficient_current_model: No badge display system exists in V2
badges.proposed_target: Implement badge rendering system; derive from phone_verified flag

badges.insufficient_current_model: No email_verified flag or email badge in V2
badges.proposed_target: Add email_verified flag; implement badge display

badges.insufficient_current_model: No identity verification badge in V2
badges.proposed_target: Derive from identity_verified trust level; implement badge display

badges.business_reason: Visual indicator of property ownership verification
badges.insufficient_current_model: No owner verification concept in V2
badges.proposed_target: Add owner_verified field; implement document verification for owners
badges.decision_question: Ownership proof criteria and verification process

badges.business_reason: Visual indicator of agency registration verification
badges.insufficient_current_model: No agency verification field on Organization model
badges.proposed_target: Add agency_verified to Organization model; implement verification workflow

badges.business_reason: Visual indicator of partner validation (notaire, géomètre, banque)
badges.insufficient_current_model: No partner badge system in V2
badges.proposed_target: Derive from professional_verified; add partner-specific badge

badges.business_reason: Visual indicator of professional status (agent, etc.)
Visual indicator of fully onboarded and active agent
badges.insufficient_current_model: No agent active status tracking in V2
badges.proposed_target: Add is_active_agent field or derive from onboarding completion
badges.impact: Active agent status is operational signal
badges.decision_question: Definition of active agent (criteria for badge display)

agency_structure.business_reason: Structured step-by-step agent onboarding from invitation to activation
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: No structured agent onboarding workflow exists in V2
agency_structure.proposed_target: Implement onboarding state machine with onboarding_status field on User
agency_structure.impact: Agent activation gates matching; CRM onboarding pipeline; identity verification
agency_structure.decision_question: Onboarding step policy and validation requirements per step

agency_structure.concept: Minimum 3 active agents for operational agency
agency_structure.business_reason: Gold business rule: agency requires minimum 3 agents for full operational status
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: No minimum agent constraint enforcement in V2
agency_structure.proposed_target: Add agent count validation rule; implement agency operational status logic
agency_structure.impact: Agency capabilities gated by agent count; operational quality control
agency_structure.decision_question: Minimum threshold value (Gold=3) and enforcement behavior

agency_structure.business_reason: Route incoming leads to appropriate agents based on geographic zone assignment
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: No lead routing mechanism exists in V2
agency_structure.proposed_target: Implement agent_zones table (agent_id, zone); build lead routing engine
agency_structure.impact: Lead distribution efficiency; agent lead volume management
agency_structure.decision_question: Routing algorithm: round-robin, score-based, or capacity-based

agency_structure.business_reason: Charge agents per lead received; core monetization mechanism
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: No lead costing system exists in V2
agency_structure.proposed_target: Implement lead costing module with configurable price per lead
agency_structure.impact: Financial impact; core revenue model for platform
agency_structure.decision_question: Lead pricing strategy: 500 FCFA default or market-adjusted pricing

agency_structure.business_reason: Agent credit system with boost purchases for visibility and lead acquisition
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: No agent credit system exists in V2
agency_structure.proposed_target: Implement agent_credits (credits, total_spent, last_recharge) and boost_purchases (boost_type, price, expires_at) models
agency_structure.impact: Financial impact; matching priority via boosts; agent engagement
agency_structure.decision_question: Credit pricing: cost per lead, boost pricing tiers

agency_structure.business_reason: Post-interaction agent rating for quality signals and matching optimization
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: No agent rating system exists in V2
agency_structure.proposed_target: Add agent_rating FLOAT field; implement post-interaction rating workflow
agency_structure.impact: Quality signals for matching; agent reputation; user trust
agency_structure.decision_question: Rating calculation method: average, weighted, or decayed

agency_structure.business_reason: Gold defines 4-tier agency hierarchy: responsible, admin, agent, assistant
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: V2 has Organization model but no agency-specific role on User within organization
agency_structure.proposed_target: Add agency_role enum field (responsible, admin, agent, assistant) to User or Organization membership model
agency_structure.impact: Agency management; lead routing; permission scoping
agency_structure.decision_question: Granularity of agency hierarchy: 4 tiers or simplified (manager/agent only)

agency_structure.concept: Agency components with trust and validation
agency_structure.business_reason: Gold agency includes trust levels, validations, and document verification
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: V2 Organization has users+properties but no agency-level trust, validations, or admin role
agency_structure.proposed_target: Add trust_level, verification fields to Organization model
agency_structure.impact: Agency-level qualification; trust scoring for matching; security gates
agency_structure.decision_question: Agency verification requirements and trust level criteria

agency_structure.concept: Agency registration fields (RCCM, CNI, tax ID)
agency_structure.business_reason: Gold requires RCCM (business registration), CNI (ID), and tax ID for agency creation
agency_structure.insufficient_current_model: V2 Organization model missing required registration fields
agency_structure.proposed_target: Add rccm, tax_id, cni_document fields to Organization model
agency_structure.impact: Agency creation compliance; identity verification; fraud prevention
agency_structure.decision_question: Required vs optional registration fields for agency creation

monetized_services.business_reason: Paid visibility boost for 7 days — core listing promotion feature
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Property model has no boost_level or boost_expires_at fields
monetized_services.proposed_target: Add boost_level and boost_expires_at to Property model; implement boost purchase flow

monetized_services.business_reason: Extended visibility boost at higher price point
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: Same as boost_7j — no boost system exists
monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement as same boost system with duration parameter (7 vs 30 days)
monetized_services.impact: Revenue generation; tiered pricing for visibility

monetized_services.business_reason: Premium listing with maximum visibility and ranking boost
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No premium listing concept in V2 Property model
monetized_services.proposed_target: Add is_premium field to Property; implement premium ranking boost in matching engine

monetized_services.business_reason: Monthly agent subscription for professional features
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No subscription model exists in V2
monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement Subscription model linked to Organization/User with billing via Campay
monetized_services.decision_question: Subscription billing cycle, features, and cancellation policy

monetized_services.business_reason: LAWIM agent accompanies client on property visit
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No visit accompaniment service model in V2
monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement as ServiceOrder with type='visit_accompaniment' linked to Conversation
monetized_services.decision_question: Visit accompaniment scope and delivery model

monetized_services.business_reason: Full transaction accompaniment from offer to signature
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No transaction accompaniment service model in V2
monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement as ServiceOrder with type='transaction_accompaniment' with fulfillment tracking

monetized_services.business_reason: Document verification service for title deeds, permits, etc.
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No document verification service in V2
monetized_services.proposed_target: Defer to later phase; requires document upload and verification workflow

monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Media model supports photo storage but not professional photography service ordering
monetized_services.proposed_target: Extend Media model with service order origin tracking

monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Media model supports video but no professional video production service
monetized_services.proposed_target: Extend Media model with service order origin for video services

monetized_services.business_reason: Property verification service to validate listing accuracy
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No property verification_status field in V2
monetized_services.proposed_target: Add verification_status and verified_at to Property; implement verification as ServiceOrder
monetized_services.impact: Trust signal; listing quality; fraud prevention

monetized_services.business_reason: 500 FCFA per connection — core LAWIM monetization mechanism
monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No pay-per-connection mechanism exists in V2
monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement LeadPurchase model + agent credit system. This is the single most important monetization mechanism.
monetized_services.decision_question: Pay-per-connection pricing and agent opt-in flow

monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No premium assistant service in V2
monetized_services.proposed_target: Requires human decision on distinction from accompagnement services before implementing
monetized_services.decision_question: Distinction from accompagnement_visite and accompagnement_transaction services

monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: Distinct from boost (2,000/5,000) and premium_listing (10,000) — unclear differentiation
monetized_services.proposed_target: Requires human decision to determine distinct semantics vs boost/premium_listing
monetized_services.decision_question: Semantic distinction from boost (2 tiers) and premium_listing services

real_estate_services.business_reason: Property valuation service — feeds directly into pricing and matching
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No valuation service or matrix in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement estimation service matrix with valuation workflow
real_estate_services.impact: Pipeline input for matching; pricing intelligence

real_estate_services.business_reason: Property inspection and professional expertise service
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No expertise service model in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement expertise service with inspection workflow

real_estate_services.business_reason: Document verification as a real estate service
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No document verification service matrix in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Linked to controle_documentaire monetized service; implement verification workflow

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Conversation model links user-property but has no visit scheduling or accompaniment tracking
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement visit scheduling as a service with state machine

real_estate_services.business_reason: Follow-up visit scheduling after initial visit
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No visit follow-up tracking in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Extend visit infrastructure with contre-visite type

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No rental management service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement rental management workflow with recurring service model
real_estate_services.decision_question: Rental management scope: full management vs referral only

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Property model covers creation but not the service of listing
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement listing as a service with order tracking

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Property model covers creation but not the service of listing
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Same as mise_en_location but for sale transaction

real_estate_services.business_reason: Professional publication of property to market channels
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Property has publishedAt but no publication workflow as a service
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement publication service with channel management

real_estate_services.business_reason: Professional property photography as a service
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Media stores photos but has no service ordering for photography
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Extend Media model with photography service order flow

real_estate_services.business_reason: Professional property videography as a service
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Media supports video but no video service ordering
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Extend Media with video service order flow

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No drone service capability in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as sub-service of photography

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No staging service model in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as professional service with staging workflow

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Project.projectType can represent renovation generically but no dedicated service
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement renovation service with scope management

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: V2 Project.projectType can represent construction generically but no dedicated service
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement construction service with project management

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No maintenance service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as recurring service

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No cleaning service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as professional service

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No security service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as professional service

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No moving service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as professional service

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No insurance service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as partner referral service

real_estate_services.business_reason: Legal advisory service for property transactions
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No legal advice service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as partner professional service with lawyer network

real_estate_services.business_reason: Tax advisory service for property transactions
real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No tax advice service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as partner professional service

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No condo management service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as professional management service

real_estate_services.insufficient_current_model: No rent recovery service in V2
real_estate_services.proposed_target: Implement as dispute resolution service
real_estate_services.decision_question: Rent recovery scope: advisory vs active collection

professional_services.business_reason: Administrative service provider for property processes

crm_monetized_services.business_reason: Single lead purchase — core monetization unit at 500 FCFA/lead
crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No lead purchase system exists in V2
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement LeadPurchase model with lead_bronze pack
crm_monetized_services.impact: Core revenue model; agent lead acquisition
crm_monetized_services.decision_question: Lead pack pricing: 500 FCFA default or market-adjusted

crm_monetized_services.business_reason: Bulk lead pack: 5 contacts at 300 FCFA/lead (40% discount vs bronze)
crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No lead pack system exists in V2
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement lead_silver pack with tiered pricing

crm_monetized_services.business_reason: Bulk lead pack: 15 contacts at 200 FCFA/lead (60% discount vs bronze)
crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No lead pack system exists in V2
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement lead_gold pack with tiered pricing

crm_monetized_services.business_reason: Pay to unlock owner contact details — 500 FCFA
crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No contact unlock mechanism in V2
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement coordinate unlock as distinct purchase type
crm_monetized_services.decision_question: Distinction from lead purchase: same price (500 FCFA) but different mechanism

crm_monetized_services.business_reason: Premium profile for property seekers with priority visibility
crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No premium profile concept in V2
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement premium seeker profile with priority features
crm_monetized_services.decision_question: Premium seeker features and pricing (1,000 FCFA in Gold)

crm_monetized_services.business_reason: Diaspora tier: access to verified properties for diaspora users
crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No diaspora service exists in V2 (feature_flag OFF)
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement diaspora service with verified property access
crm_monetized_services.decision_question: Diaspora service scope and pricing tiers

crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No diaspora service exists in V2
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement diaspora rapport tier with report delivery

crm_monetized_services.business_reason: Diaspora premium tier: full accompaniment package
crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No diaspora service exists in V2
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Implement diaspora complet tier with full accompaniment

crm_monetized_services.business_reason: Premium agent subscription with enhanced features and lead allocation
crm_monetized_services.insufficient_current_model: No subscription system exists in V2
crm_monetized_services.proposed_target: Add agent_business subscription tier to Subscription model
crm_monetized_services.decision_question: Agent Business features differentiation from Agent Pro subscription

service_lifecycle.business_reason: Complete service order lifecycle: Création → Proposition → Acceptation → Paiement → Activation → Utilisation → Expiration → Archivage
service_lifecycle.insufficient_current_model: No service order or service lifecycle exists in V2
service_lifecycle.impact: Foundation for all paid services; service fulfillment tracking

service_lifecycle.business_reason: Payment processing lifecycle: CREATED → INITIATED → PENDING → CONFIRMED → FAILED → CANCELLED → EXPIRED → REFUNDED → RECONCILED → DISPUTED
service_lifecycle.insufficient_current_model: No payment processing system active in V2 (feature flag payments=OFF)
service_lifecycle.proposed_target: Implement Payment model with 10-state sub-machine; integrate Campay
service_lifecycle.impact: Payment processing; financial tracking; dispute handling
service_lifecycle.decision_question: Payment processor selection: Campay (Gold) or multi-processor

workflows.business_reason: Algorithmic property-demandeur matching with 5 scoring dimensions, ranking, and proposals
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No matching engine or state machine exists in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Match entity with 10-state lifecycle; build scoring engine
workflows.impact: Core platform intelligence; matching is primary value proposition
workflows.decision_question: Matching algorithm design: rule-based (Gold) or ML-enhanced

workflows.concept: Mise en Relation / Contact Lifecycle (6 states)
workflows.business_reason: Structured contact workflow with mandatory double consent before contact establishment
workflows.insufficient_current_model: V2 has conversation model but no contact workflow, no double consent, no holder decision tracking
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Contact entity with 6-state lifecycle; enforce double consent; add holder silence escalation
workflows.decision_question: Double consent enforcement: mandatory for all contacts or configurable

workflows.business_reason: Complete visit scheduling: request → confirmation → realization/no-show/cancellation
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No Visit entity or state machine in V2 (project step:visit is label only)
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Visit model with 9-state lifecycle; add scheduling, confirmation, no-show tracking, post-visit NBA
workflows.impact: Core workflow; visit management; user experience

workflows.business_reason: End-to-end transaction: agreement → preparation → documents → payment → signature → keys → confirmation
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No Transaction entity or state machine in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Transaction model with 10-state lifecycle; add document requirements per type; integrate payment
workflows.impact: Core business workflow; deal closure; legal compliance
workflows.decision_question: Transaction entity vs extended Project: separate model or project extension

workflows.business_reason: Service ordering and payment processing: 8 service states + 10 payment sub-states
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No payment or service system exists in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement ServiceOrder and Payment models with full lifecycle; integrate Campay payment processor
workflows.decision_question: Payment processor, service catalog scope, pricing validation

workflows.business_reason: Incident management: reporting → qualification → analysis → decision → resolution → closure
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No incident management system in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Incident model with 8-state lifecycle; add 12 incident types; 4 priority levels
workflows.impact: Trust & safety; fraud prevention; dispute resolution
workflows.decision_question: Incident priority levels and SLA thresholds

workflows.insufficient_current_model: No mediation system exists in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Mediation model with 8-state lifecycle; define mediator role and boundaries
workflows.impact: Dispute resolution; user trust; platform governance
workflows.decision_question: Mediation as built-in platform feature vs outsourced service

workflows.business_reason: Lead management: incoming → normalize → extract → detect intent → score → classify → route
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No CRM pipeline exists in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Lead model with 8-stage pipeline; scoring engine; classification; routing
workflows.impact: Core CRM intelligence; lead management; agent efficiency
workflows.decision_question: CRM pipeline automation level: fully automated or human-in-the-loop

workflows.business_reason: External system publication with SIE reference code generation and campaign association
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No SIE publication pipeline exists in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Publication model with 11-state lifecycle; SIE integration; campaign tracking
workflows.decision_question: SIE integration priority: required for MVP or Phase 3 enhancement

workflows.business_reason: Click tracking pipeline with bot detection, duplicate detection, and analytics
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No redirection/click tracking pipeline in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Redirection model with 12-state lifecycle; bot/dedup detection; analytics

workflows.business_reason: Last-touch conversion attribution pipeline for marketing ROI
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No conversion attribution pipeline in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement Conversion model with 12-state lifecycle; last-touch attribution

workflows.business_reason: Structured agent onboarding: invitation → secure link → account → phone → CNI → validation → active
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No agent invitation/onboarding workflow in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement AgentInvitation model with 7-state lifecycle; secure link generation; document validation
workflows.decision_question: Onboarding step requirements: all Gold steps or simplified flow

workflows.business_reason: Duplicate user detection and resolution using phone, email, name, device fingerprint signals
workflows.insufficient_current_model: No identity resolution exists in V2
workflows.proposed_target: Implement IdentityResolution model with 5-state lifecycle; signal matching; human review
workflows.impact: Data quality; duplicate prevention; user experience
workflows.decision_question: Identity resolution automation level and false positive handling

workflows.business_reason: Master orchestrator that coordinates all sub-workflows: Dossier → Matching → Contact → Visit → Negotiation → Transaction → Closure
workflows.insufficient_current_model: V2 has no orchestrator; workflows are distributed across project, property, conversation models
workflows.proposed_target: Implement orchestrator workflow engine that delegates to sub-workflows
workflows.decision_question: Orchestrator implementation: workflow engine vs event-driven choreography

property_model.business_reason: Classification backbone for all property logic: residential, commercial, industrial, land, agricultural, hotel, project
property_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 has no family concept — propertyType is free-form string
property_model.proposed_target: Add property_family enum to schema.prisma with 7 values; validate in property_domain.py
property_model.impact: Foundation for all property classification, matching, qualification, and search

property_model.concept: Property type hierarchy (11 basic + 41 matrix types)
property_model.business_reason: Validated property type system with subtypes per family
property_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 propertyType is free-form string with no validation or hierarchy
property_model.proposed_target: Create PROPERTY_TYPES enum set; store subtype in metadata_json; add type-to-family validation
property_model.impact: Type validation; type-based business logic; search filtering

property_model.business_reason: All 107 Heritage Gold qualification matrices require type-level granularity
property_model.insufficient_current_model: No qualification matrix system exists in V2
property_model.proposed_target: Link property types to qualification matrix catalog; implement matrix selection by type

property_model.business_reason: Full enrichment pipeline: Réception → Normalisation → Classification → Validation → Publication → Matching → Mise en relation → Suivi → Archivage → Conservation
property_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 has 5 statuses (draft, open, closed, published, archived) — no enrichment or commercial pipeline
property_model.proposed_target: Extend property state machine from 5 to 10+ states covering enrichment and commercial pipeline
property_model.impact: Complete property workflow; business rule enforcement
property_model.decision_question: State granularity: full 10-step or key additions (Qualification, Validation, Transaction)

property_model.business_reason: Comprehensive publication validation: family, type, location, price, détenteur, normalization, documents, code checks
property_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 can_publish() checks only 3 of 8 rules (title, city, price)
property_model.proposed_target: Expand can_publish() from 3 to 8 rules including family validation, type coherence, détenteur check, normalization, document presence
property_model.impact: Listing quality; data integrity; publication gate

property_model.business_reason: Comprehensive pricing: affiché, négociable, final, estimation, fourchette, historique
property_model.proposed_target: Extend price model: add price_displayed, negotiable flag, price_negotiable, price_final, price_estimation, price_history to metadata_json
property_model.impact: Pricing flexibility; negotiation support; price analytics
property_model.decision_question: Price field priority: which levels are MVP vs enhancement

property_model.business_reason: Rental-specific and fee pricing: loyer, caution, avance, dépôt garantie, mensualité, frais service, taxes
property_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 has no distinction between sale price, rent, deposit, fees, or taxes
property_model.proposed_target: Add price type classification field; store typed prices in metadata_json
property_model.impact: Rental workflow; fee transparency; deposit tracking
property_model.decision_question: Price type implementation: typed fields vs metadata_json storage

property_model.business_reason: Quality scoring: completeness(0.6) + reliability(0.4) → grade A+(≥80), A(≥60), B(≥40), C(≥20), D(<20)
property_model.insufficient_current_model: No data quality scoring system exists in V2
property_model.proposed_target: Implement quality scoring engine with completeness and reliability dimensions; grade properties A+ through D
property_model.impact: Search ranking; matching quality; data improvement incentives
property_model.decision_question: Scoring dimensions and weights: Gold formula or adjusted

property_model.business_reason: Family/type-specific fields (industrial: access_camion, hauteur_plafond; land: title_status, is_constructible; commercial: front_window)
property_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 has 3 generic fields (surface, bedrooms, bathrooms) for all property types
property_model.proposed_target: Add per-type field schemas in metadata_json with validation per property family
property_model.impact: Type-specific qualification; type-specific search; data completeness
property_model.decision_question: Per-type field priority: which families first (land/document fields highest impact)

property_model.business_reason: Enforce availability transitions: available→pending→rented/sold→archived with guarded transitions
property_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 availability is a free string (available, reserved, sold, rented, unavailable) with no transition enforcement
property_model.proposed_target: Implement availability state machine with valid transition rules per Gold specification
property_model.impact: Data integrity; lifecycle enforcement; availability accuracy

property_model.business_reason: Stale properties with 90 days of inactivity should be automatically archived
property_model.insufficient_current_model: No auto-archive mechanism exists in V2
property_model.proposed_target: Implement cron job for 90-day inactivity auto-archive

property_model.business_reason: Investment-specific property handling: investissement_locatif, terrain, commercial, promotion, syndicat_copropriete
property_model.insufficient_current_model: Not represented in V2 property model
property_model.proposed_target: Add investment-specific fields and workflows to property model

property_model.business_reason: Full agricultural sub-referentiel with family-specific fields
property_model.insufficient_current_model: Agricultural property concept does not exist in V2
property_model.proposed_target: Add agricultural family to property_family enum; implement sub-referentiel

property_model.business_reason: Dedicated hotelier family distinct from commercial type
property_model.insufficient_current_model: Hotel is treated as commercial type or not represented in V2
property_model.proposed_target: Add hotel family to property_family enum; map commercial.hotel to this family

property_model.business_reason: Development project as a property family linked to Project model
property_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 has separate Project model; not linked as property family
property_model.proposed_target: Add project family to property_family enum; link Property to Project for development properties
property_model.decision_question: Project family: property_family enum value or separate model link

intent_detection.business_reason: Automatically detect user intent from natural language input using FR/EN/PID keyword dictionaries
intent_detection.insufficient_current_model: V2 has no intent detection — users explicitly select project_type from form
intent_detection.proposed_target: Implement intent classifier KLASS with keyword dictionaries for FR, EN, PID languages
intent_detection.impact: Chat-based interaction; automatic routing; lead qualification
intent_detection.decision_question: Intent detection mandatory for all channels or chat-only

intent_detection.business_reason: Minimum confidence score for intent assignment; fallback below threshold
intent_detection.insufficient_current_model: No confidence scoring or threshold concept in V2
intent_detection.proposed_target: Implement configurable confidence threshold with fallback mechanism
intent_detection.impact: Classification quality; fallback handling; user experience

intent_detection.business_reason: Support multiple parallel intents expressed in a single user utterance
intent_detection.insufficient_current_model: V2 supports single project_type per user; no parallel intent handling
intent_detection.proposed_target: Allow parallel project creation from multi-intent detection results
intent_detection.impact: User experience; complex use case support

intent_detection.business_reason: Detect urgency from temporal keywords in user input for lead prioritization
intent_detection.insufficient_current_model: No urgency detection mechanism in V2
intent_detection.proposed_target: Add urgency scoring to intent detection pipeline; store urgency level on Project
intent_detection.impact: Lead prioritization; SLA routing; agent response time
intent_detection.decision_question: Urgency scoring method and integration with lead scoring

intent_detection.business_reason: Extract budget amounts, location names, property types, and timeframes per detected intent
intent_detection.insufficient_current_model: No structured entity extraction in V2
intent_detection.proposed_target: Implement per-intent entity extraction for qualification auto-population
intent_detection.decision_question: Entity extraction method: rule-based (Gold) or NLP

intent_detection.business_reason: Map detected intent to platform role (buyer/tenant/seller/investor/visitor) for personalization
intent_detection.insufficient_current_model: No formal role mapping or user role abstraction exists in V2
intent_detection.proposed_target: Implement Intent model with role mapping layer; assign user role based on detected intent
intent_detection.impact: User journey personalization; role-based access; qualification targeting

transaction_types.business_reason: Short-term rental (chambre_hotel, appartement_courte_duree) — distinct from standard rent
transaction_types.insufficient_current_model: Subsumed by 'rent' project_type; no dedicated short_stay handling
transaction_types.proposed_target: Add 'short_stay' to PROJECT_TYPES or implement as sub-type with metadata
transaction_types.impact: Short-term rental support; qualification matrix selection
transaction_types.decision_question: Short_stay: dedicated project_type or rent sub-type with metadata

transaction_types.business_reason: Long-term lease (3+ years) with distinct legal requirements
transaction_types.insufficient_current_model: Subsumed by 'rent' with timeline_horizon maxing at 2 years
transaction_types.proposed_target: Add 'lease' to PROJECT_TYPES; extend timeline_horizon to support 3+ years
transaction_types.impact: Long-term lease support; commercial lease handling

transaction_types.business_reason: Transfer of commercial lease rights — distinct legal transaction
transaction_types.insufficient_current_model: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
transaction_types.proposed_target: Add 'commercial_lease_transfer' as project type or sub-type
transaction_types.decision_question: Cession_bail: dedicated type or metadata extension of 'lease'

transaction_types.business_reason: Commercial lease with 3-9 year terms and specific legal requirements
transaction_types.insufficient_current_model: Subsumed by generic 'rent' with no commercial lease handling
transaction_types.proposed_target: Add commercial lease handling to 'lease' type or create dedicated sub-type

transaction_types.business_reason: Transfer of business assets (fonds de commerce) — not pure real estate
transaction_types.insufficient_current_model: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
transaction_types.decision_question: Cession: in-scope for LAWIM or out-of-scope

transaction_types.business_reason: Standalone financing request with 10 qualification matrices
transaction_types.insufficient_current_model: Implicitly bundled into buy/invest projects; no standalone financing request type
transaction_types.proposed_target: Add 'finance' to PROJECT_TYPES; implement 10 financing qualification matrices
transaction_types.decision_question: Finance: standalone project type or sub-intent of buy/invest

transaction_types.business_reason: Professional service discovery (find agent, notary, architect, etc.) — 27 matrices
transaction_types.insufficient_current_model: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
transaction_types.proposed_target: Add 'find' to PROJECT_TYPES; implement professional search workflow
transaction_types.decision_question: Find: core LAWIM feature or separate marketplace

transaction_types.business_reason: Procurement of real estate services (estimation, expertise, etc.) — 24 matrices
transaction_types.insufficient_current_model: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
transaction_types.proposed_target: Add 'service' to PROJECT_TYPES; implement service procurement workflow
transaction_types.decision_question: Service procurement: integrated workflow or separate service ordering

qualification_engine.business_reason: Core buyer/tenant qualification with 18 residential search matrices
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: No qualification matrix system exists in V2
qualification_engine.proposed_target: Implement 18 residential qualification matrices with field definitions and priority

qualification_engine.business_reason: Land buyer qualification with title status handling
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: No land qualification matrices in V2
qualification_engine.proposed_target: Implement 7 land qualification matrices with title status fields

qualification_engine.business_reason: Commercial property qualification across 21 use cases
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: No commercial qualification matrices in V2

qualification_engine.business_reason: Investor qualification with investment type differentiation
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: No investment qualification matrices in V2
No financing qualification matrices in V2
No professional search matrices in V2

qualification_engine.concept: Real Estate Service qualification matrices (24 matrices)
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: No real estate service matrices in V2

qualification_engine.business_reason: Per-field role mapping for qualification — each field is answered by a specific matching role
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: No field-to-role mapping exists in V2 qualification
qualification_engine.proposed_target: Implement field dictionary with role assignments per qualification matrix field

qualification_engine.business_reason: Priority weighting for qualification questions to determine asking order and optionality
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: No question priority weighting in V2 qualification
qualification_engine.proposed_target: Implement priority levels for qualification fields (mandatory, important, optional)

qualification_engine.business_reason: Strict progressive disclosure: Intention → Type → Ville → Quartier → Budget → Délai → Critères → Préférences → Confirmation → Escalade
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: V2 has flat journey steps with no progressive disclosure order
qualification_engine.proposed_target: Implement ordered qualification wizard with 10-step progressive disclosure
qualification_engine.impact: User experience; data quality; completion rate

qualification_engine.business_reason: Qualification adapted to channel: WhatsApp (1 question), Telegram (2-3), Dashboard (full form)
qualification_engine.insufficient_current_model: V2 has single qualification flow regardless of channel
qualification_engine.proposed_target: Implement channel-adaptive qualification with configurable question limits per channel
qualification_engine.decision_question: Per-channel question limits: Gold defaults or adjustable per channel

crm.business_reason: Compute lead score from base (25-95) + boosters (+10 to +25) - penalties (-10 to -50)
crm.insufficient_current_model: No lead scoring exists in V2
crm.proposed_target: Implement scoring engine with base scores, boosters, and penalties
crm.impact: Lead prioritization; routing decisions; agent efficiency

crm.business_reason: Boost lead score based on detected positive signals: budget, location, urgency, diaspora, cash purchase
crm.insufficient_current_model: No score boosting mechanism in V2
crm.proposed_target: Implement 13+ configurable score boosters with weights

crm.business_reason: Reduce lead score for negative signals: missing budget, unclear location, spam indicators
crm.insufficient_current_model: No score penalty mechanism in V2
crm.proposed_target: Implement 8+ configurable score penalties with weights

crm.business_reason: Classify leads into HOT, WARM, COLD, LOW, SPAM based on score thresholds
crm.proposed_target: Implement classification thresholds and class assignment logic
crm.impact: Lead priority; routing rules; agent assignment

crm.business_reason: Route classified leads to appropriate agents based on score, zone, availability
crm.insufficient_current_model: No lead routing mechanism in V2
crm.proposed_target: Implement routing engine with configurable rules (score-based, zone-based, round-robin)
crm.impact: Lead distribution; agent efficiency; response time
crm.decision_question: Routing strategy: primary routing dimension (score vs zone vs round-robin)

crm.business_reason: Multi-dimensional scoring across 7 CRM factors for comprehensive lead evaluation
crm.proposed_target: Implement 7-factor scoring model with configurable factor weights
crm.decision_question: 7-factor scoring implementation: integrated or separate from lead scoring

crm.business_reason: Track user behavior signals: message_history, response_time, budget_changes, visit_requests
crm.insufficient_current_model: No behavior tracking infrastructure in V2
crm.proposed_target: Add behavior tracking fields to Lead/User model; implement data collection points
crm.impact: Lead scoring input; agent insight; personalization

crm.business_reason: Detect and mitigate: broker_spam, duplicate_listing, fake_price, suspicious_urgency
crm.proposed_target: Implement 4 fraud detection layers with configurable rules and temporary suspension actions
crm.impact: Platform trust; fraud prevention; data quality
crm.decision_question: Anti-fraud automation: automatic suspension or human-in-the-loop

crm.business_reason: Collect and display agent quality ratings after each interaction (1-5 scale)
crm.insufficient_current_model: No agent rating mechanism in V2
crm.proposed_target: Implement post-interaction rating workflow and agent_rating calculation
crm.impact: Agent quality signals; matching input; user trust
crm.decision_question: Rating collection timing and calculation method

crm.business_reason: Customer satisfaction collection, analysis, and reporting
crm.insufficient_current_model: No feedback handling in V2 (Notification model exists but no feedback loop)
crm.proposed_target: Implement feedback collection, aggregation, and reporting module
crm.impact: Service quality; user satisfaction; improvement insights

crm.business_reason: Guaranteed response times: P0<30min, P1<2h, P2<24h, P3=J+1 to J+7
crm.insufficient_current_model: No lead SLA concept in V2
crm.proposed_target: Implement SLA tracking per lead with priority-based thresholds and breach escalation
crm.impact: Response time guarantees; agent accountability; lead satisfaction
crm.decision_question: SLA thresholds and breach escalation workflow

matching.business_reason: Algorithmic property-demandeur matching — core platform intelligence
matching.insufficient_current_model: No matching engine exists in V2
matching.proposed_target: Implement Match entity and matching algorithm with trigger events
matching.decision_question: Matching engine: rule-based scoring vs ML-based

matching.business_reason: Multi-dimensional scoring: Real Estate (sub-dimensions), Availability, Document, Holder Reliability, Transaction Success
matching.insufficient_current_model: No scoring dimensions exist in V2
matching.proposed_target: Implement 5 scoring dimensions with configurable weights per property type
matching.decision_question: Scoring dimension weights: Gold defaults or tunable

matching.business_reason: Location-based matching with 5 geographic proximity tiers
matching.insufficient_current_model: No geographic scoring in V2 matching
matching.proposed_target: Implement geographic scoring with distance tiers and zone-based matching

matching.business_reason: Classify matches into Excellent, Good, Average, Low based on composite score
matching.insufficient_current_model: No compatibility level classification in V2
matching.proposed_target: Implement compatibility level thresholds and display logic
matching.decision_question: Compatibility level thresholds (score ranges per level)

matching.business_reason: Automatic rematching on refusal, visit failure, negotiation failure
matching.proposed_target: Implement rematching triggers and rules; add rematching_count to dossier
matching.decision_question: Rematching trigger events and exclusion rules

matching.business_reason: Exclude properties from matching based on incompatible criteria
matching.insufficient_current_model: No exclusion logic in V2 matching
matching.proposed_target: Implement exclusion rule engine with configurable criteria

matching.business_reason: Predict probability of successful transaction for each match
matching.insufficient_current_model: No transaction success prediction in V2
matching.proposed_target: Implement transaction success score based on historical patterns and match quality
matching.decision_question: Transaction success score: statistical model or heuristic

matching.business_reason: Supply/demand ratio per market segment to inform matching strategy
matching.proposed_target: Implement market tension index calculation by property type, location, price range

matching.business_reason: Quality and completeness assessment of demandeur dossier for match readiness
matching.insufficient_current_model: No dossier health scoring in V2
matching.proposed_target: Implement dossier health score based on qualification completeness and data quality

matching.business_reason: Quality assessment of property listing for match readiness
matching.insufficient_current_model: No property health scoring in V2
matching.proposed_target: Implement property health score based on data quality, completeness, freshness

matching.business_reason: Specific matching roles for demandeur, holder, agent, notaire, etc. with role-specific scoring
matching.insufficient_current_model: No matching role concept in V2
matching.proposed_target: Define 9 matching roles with role-specific scoring weights and permissions
matching.decision_question: Matching role definitions and scoring weights per role

matching.business_reason: Automatically broaden search criteria when initial matches are insufficient
matching.insufficient_current_model: No search expansion logic in V2
matching.proposed_target: Implement progressive search expansion rules (expand location, budget range, property type)
matching.decision_question: Search expansion rules: priority order and maximum expansion bounds

matching.business_reason: Monitor new property publications against existing dossiers for real-time matching
matching.insufficient_current_model: No market surveillance mechanism in V2
matching.proposed_target: Implement event-driven matching triggers on new property publication and availability changes

sla.business_reason: Market rotation durations vary by property type (24h to 1095d)
sla.insufficient_current_model: No SLA concept exists in V2
sla.proposed_target: Implement SLA registry with configurable thresholds per property type per state
sla.decision_question: SLA threshold values per property type

sla.business_reason: Each state in each workflow has maximum allowed duration before escalation
sla.insufficient_current_model: No state-level SLA enforcement in V2
sla.proposed_target: Implement per-state SLA thresholds with configurable duration per entity type
sla.decision_question: State SLA thresholds: which states get which durations

sla.business_reason: Lead response time guarantees: P0<30min, P1<2h, P2<24h, P3=J+1 to J+7
sla.insufficient_current_model: No lead SLA concept in V2
sla.proposed_target: Implement SLA by lead priority with breach detection and escalation
sla.decision_question: SLA time thresholds per priority level

sla.business_reason: Monitor all SLA thresholds with configurable check frequency (1min to 24h)
sla.insufficient_current_model: No SLA monitoring infrastructure in V2
sla.proposed_target: Implement SLA breach detection service with configurable check intervals
sla.decision_question: SLA check frequency per entity type

sla.business_reason: Progressive escalation on SLA breach: NOTIFY → NBA_RECALCULATE → ESCALATE
sla.insufficient_current_model: No SLA escalation mechanism in V2
sla.proposed_target: Implement 3-tier escalation workflow with configurable actions per tier
sla.decision_question: Escalation actions per tier per entity type

sla.business_reason: 3-tier reminder system for non-responsive holders: Reminder 1→2→3→Property to confirm→Rematch
sla.insufficient_current_model: No holder response tracking or silence escalation in V2
sla.proposed_target: Implement holder silence tracking with configurable reminder intervals and escalation actions
sla.decision_question: Silence escalation intervals and actions per tier

nba.business_reason: State-specific recommended next actions for all states across all workflows
nba.insufficient_current_model: V2 has derive_next_actions() for pending steps only — not per-state NBA
nba.proposed_target: Implement NBA registry with state-specific action definitions per workflow

nba.insufficient_current_model: No NBA priority system in V2
nba.proposed_target: Implement 9-level NBA priority with action-specific priority assignment

nba.business_reason: Structured follow-up intervals for negotiations and pending actions
nba.proposed_target: Implement follow-up scheduling with J1, J7, J30, J90 intervals and automatic reminders
nba.decision_question: Follow-up interval configuration and reminder channel

nba.business_reason: NBA changes dynamically when SLA threshold is at risk or breached
nba.proposed_target: Implement NBA recalculation trigger on SLA breach events

permission_model.business_reason: Formal approval workflow for agency creation, listing validation, professional verification
permission_model.insufficient_current_model: No explicit approval level or workflow exists in V2
permission_model.proposed_target: Implement ApprovalWorkflow model with approver_role, target_type, target_id, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at
permission_model.impact: Security-critical function; listing validation; agency creation
permission_model.decision_question: Approval workflow: which actions require approval and which roles can approve

permission_model.business_reason: Formalize implicit read access into explicit permission level (currently PARTIAL_MATCH)
permission_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 read access is implicit per role; no explicit permission check
permission_model.proposed_target: Implement explicit Read permission check system if fine-grained RBAC needed
permission_model.decision_question: Explicit permission system: implement full RBAC or keep implicit

permission_model.business_reason: Formalize per-role creation rights (currently PARTIAL_MATCH, hardcoded per feature)
permission_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 creation rights are role-dependent but not formally modeled
permission_model.proposed_target: Formalize Create permission level per role in permission matrix

permission_model.business_reason: Formalize edit scope (own vs. managed vs. all) — currently PARTIAL_MATCH
permission_model.insufficient_current_model: V2 edit access granted by ownership or organization; no formal items-under-responsibility concept
permission_model.proposed_target: Formalize Edit permission scope with three tiers: own, managed, all

phase_0_foundation.name: Foundation
phase_0_foundation.focus: Property families, types, basic state machine

phase_1_core_business.name: Core Business
phase_1_core_business.focus: Trust, matching, CRM, monetization, intent detection, workflows

phase_2_operations.name: Operations
phase_2_operations.focus: Agency, onboarding, disputes, NBA, SLA, qualification

phase_3_analytics.name: Analytics
phase_3_analytics.focus: SIE pipelines, conversion, quality scoring, remaining property

phase_4_enhancement.name: Enhancement
phase_4_enhancement.focus: Mediation, identity resolution, remaining services, professional profiles
